potion.name: Potion
potion.description: A magical liquid that restores health.

godly_sword.name: Godly Sword
godly_sword.description: A legendary sword with immense power.

godly_shield.name: Godly Shield
godly_shield.description: A legendary shield with immense defense.

Invisibility Cloak.name: Invisibility Cloak
Invisibility Cloak.description: A cloak that grants temporary invisibility.

Health Elixir.name: Health Elixir
Health Elixir.description: A powerful elixir that fully restores health.

Fire Sword.name: Fire Sword
Fire Sword.description: A sword imbued with the power of fire, dealing extra damage.

Ice Shield.name: Ice Shield
Ice Shield.description: A shield that can freeze attackers, reducing their attack power.

Thunder Hammer.name: Thunder Hammer
Thunder Hammer.description: A hammer that strikes with the power of thunder, stunning enemies.

Earth Armor.name: Earth Armor
Earth Armor.description: Armor that increases defense and reduces damage taken.

Wind Dagger.name: Wind Dagger
Wind Dagger.description: A dagger that strikes with the speed of the wind, allowing for multiple attacks.
